steps.title: Find the lower heart rate
steps.content:
The lower end of the recommended training range is $p=0.5$. Substitute this value into the formula:
$$
H=140(0.5)+55=70+55=125
$$

steps.title: Find the upper heart rate
steps.content:
At the upper end of the recommended range, $p=0.85$. This gives
$$
H=140(0.85)+55=119+55=174
$$

steps.title: Write the training range
steps.content: Because $H=140p+55$ has a positive coefficient on $p$, the target heart rate increases as $p$ increases. The training heart rate range is $$ 125\le H\le174 $$ The answer is A.
